title: Transportation Sentences
description: Learn A2 sentences about using transportation.

steps.pinyin: wǒ měi tiān dā gōng chē qù shàng bān.
steps.english_hint: I take the bus to work every day.

hints.vi: Tôi đi xe buýt đi làm mỗi ngày.
hints.th: ฉันนั่งรถเมล์ไปทำงานทุกวัน
hints.id: Saya naik bus ke kantor setiap hari.

steps.teacher: 我喜歡坐地鐵，因為很快。
expected_answer: 我喜歡坐地鐵，因為很快。
steps.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huān zuò dì tiě, yīn wèi hěn kuài.
steps.english_hint: I like the metro because it's fast.

hints.vi: Tôi thích tàu điện ngầm vì nó nhanh.
hints.th: ฉันชอบรถไฟฟ้าใต้ดินเพราะมันเร็ว

encouragements.th: ให้เหตุผลได้ดีมาก!

steps.teacher: 我今天要去車站接朋友。
expected_answer: 我今天要去車站接朋友。
steps.pinyin: wǒ jīn tiān yào qù chē zhàn jiē péng yǒu.
steps.english_hint: I will go to the station to pick up my friend today.

hints.vi: Hôm nay tôi sẽ ra ga đón bạn.
hints.th: วันนี้ฉันจะไปที่สถานีเพื่อรับเพื่อน
hints.id: Saya akan pergi ke stasiun untuk menjemput teman saya hari ini.

steps.teacher: 下班時間公車常常很擠。
expected_answer: 下班時間公車常常很擠。
steps.pinyin: xià bān shí jiān gōng chē cháng cháng hěn jǐ.
steps.english_hint: Buses are often crowded after work.

hints.vi: Xe buýt thường đông đúc sau giờ làm.
hints.th: รถเมล์มักจะแน่นหลังเลิกงาน
hints.id: Bus sering ramai setelah pulang kerja.

steps.teacher: 如果下雨，我就叫計程車。
expected_answer: 如果下雨，我就叫計程車。
steps.pinyin: rú guǒ xià yǔ, wǒ jiù jiào jì chéng chē.
steps.english_hint: If it rains, I'll call a taxi.

hints.vi: Nếu trời mưa, tôi sẽ gọi taxi.
hints.th: ถ้าฝนตก ฉันจะเรียกแท็กซี่
hints.id: Kalau hujan, saya akan panggil taksi.

encouragements.th: ประโยคเงื่อนไขดีมาก!

steps.teacher: 我明天要搭火車去外地。
expected_answer: 我明天要搭火車去外地。
steps.pinyin: wǒ míng tiān yào dā huǒ chē qù wài dì.
steps.english_hint: I'm taking a train out of town tomorrow.

hints.vi: Ngày mai tôi sẽ đi tàu ra khỏi thành phố.
hints.th: พรุ่งนี้ฉันจะนั่งรถไฟออกนอกเมือง
hints.id: Besok saya akan naik kereta ke luar kota.

encouragements.th: ประโยคบอกอนาคตดีมาก!
encouragements.id: Bentuk waktu masa depan yang bagus!

steps.pinyin: wǒ cháng cháng zài chē shàng tīng yīn yuè.
steps.english_hint: I often listen to music on the bus/train.

hints.vi: Tôi thường nghe nhạc trên xe buýt/tàu.
hints.th: ฉันมักจะฟังเพลงบนรถเมล์/รถไฟ
hints.id: Saya sering mendengarkan musik di bus/kereta.

encouragements.vi: Câu diễn tả thói quen tốt!
encouragements.th: ประโยคบอกนิสัยดีมาก!

steps.teacher: 我要轉車一次才能到公司。
expected_answer: 我要轉車一次才能到公司。
steps.pinyin: wǒ yào zhuǎn chē yí cì cái néng dào gōng sī.
steps.english_hint: I need to transfer once to get to my office.

hints.vi: Tôi cần chuyển tuyến một lần để đến văn phòng.
hints.th: ฉันต้องเปลี่ยนรถหนึ่งครั้งเพื่อไปที่ทำงาน
hints.id: Saya perlu transit sekali untuk sampai ke kantor saya.

steps.pinyin: chē piào kě yǐ yòng shǒu jī mǎi.
steps.english_hint: You can buy the ticket with your phone.

hints.vi: Bạn có thể mua vé bằng điện thoại.
hints.th: คุณสามารถซื้อตั๋วด้วยโทรศัพท์ของคุณได้
hints.id: Anda bisa membeli tiket dengan ponsel Anda.

encouragements.th: ประโยคดีมาก!

steps.teacher: 我怕坐飛機，因為太高了。
expected_answer: 我怕坐飛機，因為太高了。
steps.pinyin: wǒ pà zuò fēi jī, yīn wèi tài gāo le.
steps.english_hint: I'm afraid of flying because it's too high.

hints.vi: Tôi sợ đi máy bay vì nó quá cao.
hints.th: ฉันกลัวการบินเพราะมันสูงเกินไป
hints.id: Saya takut terbang karena terlalu tinggi.
